query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO island_guides (name, slug, atoll, guide, contentType, featured, published, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('Rasdhoo', 'rasdhoo', 'Alif Alif Atoll', 'Rasdhoo is a vibrant local island known for excellent diving spots and whale shark encounters. This charming island offers pristine beaches, authentic Maldivian culture, and direct access to world-class dive sites. Perfect for marine enthusiasts seeking budget-friendly island experiences with premium diving opportunities.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Thoddoo', 'thoddoo', 'Alif Alif Atoll', 'Thoddoo, known as the Watermelon Island, is a charming local island with authentic streets and hidden viewpoints. This traditional island offers snorkeling and diving opportunities, beautiful beaches, and genuine cultural interactions. A perfect destination for slow travelers seeking authentic Maldivian experiences away from resort crowds.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Ukulhas', 'ukulhas', 'Alif Alif Atoll', 'Ukulhas is a local island featuring white sand beaches and one of the best house reefs in the Maldives. This authentic island offers excellent snorkeling directly from the beach, traditional Maldivian hospitality, and a relaxed atmosphere. Ideal for budget travelers seeking premium marine experiences without resort prices.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Gan', 'gan', 'Addu Atoll', 'Gan is the second largest island in Addu Atoll with fascinating WWII heritage and historical significance. This unique island combines wartime history with modern amenities, offering visitors a blend of cultural exploration and authentic local experiences. Home to Addu''s airport and gateway to the southernmost atoll.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Hithadhoo', 'hithadhoo', 'Addu Atoll', 'Hithadhoo is the largest island in Addu Atoll, serving as the cultural and commercial heart of the region. This vibrant island features local markets, authentic Maldivian cuisine, and rich maritime heritage. A perfect base for exploring Addu''s diverse attractions and experiencing authentic island life.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Maradhoo', 'maradhoo', 'Addu Atoll', 'Maradhoo is a peaceful island in Addu City connected by causeway, offering authentic local experiences and pristine beaches. This traditional island maintains genuine Maldivian culture while providing access to modern amenities. Perfect for cultural immersion and exploring the heart-shaped atoll''s natural beauty.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Kudahuvadhoo', 'kudahuvadhoo', 'Dhaalu Atoll', 'Kudahuvadhoo features a nature park with coastal scrub, mangroves, and stunning reef views. This authentic local island offers a low-key backpacking experience with simple trails and natural attractions. Perfect for nature lovers seeking pristine environments and genuine cultural interactions away from commercial tourism.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Veligandu', 'veligandu', 'Dhaalu Atoll', 'Veligandu is a resort island in Dhaalu Atoll offering luxury experiences amid pristine coral reefs. This island combines world-class resort amenities with authentic Maldivian hospitality and exceptional diving opportunities. Ideal for travelers seeking premium island experiences with direct access to marine adventures.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Nilandhoo', 'nilandhoo', 'Faafu Atoll', 'Nilandhoo serves as the administrative capital of Faafu Atoll with approximately 1,000 residents. This traditional island features authentic architecture, local schools, and a thriving fishing industry. Visitors can explore cultural sites including historical mosques and traditional craftwork centers for genuine cultural immersion.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Dharanboodhoo', 'dharanboodhoo', 'Faafu Atoll', 'Dharanboodhoo offers authentic local island experiences focused on traditional fishing and agriculture. This island''s pristine beaches remain largely untouched by commercial development, providing excellent opportunities for cultural immersion and nature photography. Perfect for travelers seeking genuine Maldivian experiences.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Magoodhoo', 'magoodhoo', 'Faafu Atoll', 'Magoodhoo represents traditional Maldivian island life at its most authentic, maintaining traditional fishing methods and local cuisine preparation. This small community offers basic but comfortable guesthouse accommodation and serves as an excellent base for exploring Faafu''s natural beauty and cultural heritage.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Villingili', 'villingili', 'Gaafu Alifu Atoll', 'Villingili is a significant island in Gaafu Alifu Atoll known for pristine coral reefs and authentic culture. This island combines traditional Maldivian hospitality with access to world-class diving sites. Perfect for travelers seeking authentic experiences in one of the Maldives'' most pristine and culturally rich regions.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Kandooma', 'kandooma', 'Gaafu Alifu Atoll', 'Kandooma is a resort island in Gaafu Alifu Atoll offering luxury experiences amid exceptional marine environments. This island features world-class amenities and direct access to pristine coral reefs and diverse marine life. Ideal for luxury travelers seeking premium island experiences in a pristine setting.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Thinadhoo', 'thinadhoo', 'Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll', 'Thinadhoo is the capital island of Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll, offering an authentic, uncrowded local island experience far from resort crowds. This traditional island provides genuine cultural interactions and pristine natural beauty. Perfect for travelers seeking authentic Maldivian experiences in a remote, undeveloped setting.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Maguhdhuvaa', 'maguhdhuvaa', 'Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll', 'Maguhdhuvaa is part of Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll, characterized by deep lagoons and stunning coral reefs. This island offers excellent diving and snorkeling opportunities in pristine marine environments. Ideal for marine enthusiasts seeking world-class underwater experiences in a remote atoll setting.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Utheemu', 'utheemu', 'Haa Alifu Atoll', 'Utheemu is one of the most historically significant inhabited islands in the Maldives, located in the far north. This culturally rich island features historical landmarks and traditional heritage sites. Perfect for history enthusiasts and cultural explorers seeking authentic northern Maldivian experiences.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Hanimaadhoo', 'hanimaadhoo', 'Haa Alifu Atoll', 'Hanimaadhoo is a northern island offering island hopping adventures and excellent snorkeling opportunities. This traditional island provides access to pristine beaches and authentic local culture. Perfect for travelers seeking adventure and cultural immersion in the Maldives'' northern regions.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Thulhaadhoo', 'thulhaadhoo', 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll', 'Thulhaadhoo is known for authentic culture and traditional Maldivian heritage in the northern atolls. This island offers genuine cultural interactions and pristine natural beauty. Perfect for travelers seeking authentic northern Maldivian experiences and cultural immersion away from commercial tourism.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Mulhadhoo', 'mulhadhoo', 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll', 'Mulhadhoo offers island hopping adventures and snorkeling opportunities in the northern Maldives. This traditional island features great photography opportunities and authentic local experiences. Ideal for adventure travelers and photographers seeking pristine natural beauty and cultural authenticity.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Hoarafushi', 'hoarafushi', 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll', 'Hoarafushi is a northern island known for its pristine beaches and authentic local culture. This traditional island offers excellent snorkeling and diving opportunities. Perfect for travelers seeking authentic northern Maldivian experiences with access to pristine marine environments.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Funadhoo', 'funadhoo', 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll', 'Funadhoo is part of the northern atolls offering island hopping and snorkeling adventures. This traditional island maintains authentic Maldivian culture and provides access to pristine beaches. Ideal for travelers seeking authentic experiences in the Maldives'' northern regions.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Velidhoo', 'velidhoo', 'Haa Dhaalu Atoll', 'Velidhoo is a northern island featuring pristine beaches and excellent snorkeling opportunities. This traditional island offers authentic local experiences and access to pristine marine environments. Perfect for budget travelers seeking authentic northern Maldivian island experiences.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Fonadhoo', 'fonadhoo', 'Laamu Atoll', 'Fonadhoo is the administrative capital of Laamu Atoll, home to the historic Friday Mosque built from coral stone. This island features centuries of cultural heritage and traditional Maldivian architecture. Perfect for history enthusiasts and cultural explorers seeking authentic island experiences.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Mundoo', 'mundoo', 'Laamu Atoll', 'Mundoo is a secluded local island in Laamu Atoll featuring pristine beaches and excellent marine life. This authentic island offers genuine Maldivian culture and access to pristine natural beauty. Perfect for travelers seeking secluded island experiences with authentic cultural immersion.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Kadhdhoo', 'kadhdhoo', 'Laamu Atoll', 'Kadhdhoo is a historic domestic airport island constructed with international support (1982-1986), serving as the gateway to Laamu Atoll. This unique island combines historical significance with modern airport facilities. Perfect for travelers seeking unique island experiences with historical context.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Meedhoo', 'meedhoo', 'Meemu Atoll', 'Meedhoo offers one of the most authentic Maldivian experiences available to visitors in Meemu Atoll. This central atoll island maintains traditional ways of life while welcoming visitors. Perfect for travelers seeking genuine cultural immersion and authentic island experiences.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Ungoofaaru', 'ungoofaaru', 'Noonu Atoll', 'Ungoofaaru is a local island in Noonu Atoll offering authentic Maldivian experiences and pristine beaches. This traditional island provides access to genuine local culture and natural beauty. Perfect for travelers seeking authentic island experiences in the northern atolls.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Naifaru', 'naifaru', 'Shaviyani Atoll', 'Naifaru is an island in Shaviyani Atoll, the least developed of all Maldivian atolls, offering an exquisite personal hideaway experience. This remote island features fine lagoons and pristine natural beauty. Perfect for travelers seeking undiscovered island experiences away from commercial tourism.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Vaadhoo', 'vaadhoo', 'Thaa Atoll', 'Vaadhoo is famous for the Sea of Stars phenomenon - bioluminescent plankton creating magical nighttime displays. This unique island offers both natural wonders and authentic local culture. Perfect for travelers seeking unique natural phenomena and authentic island experiences.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Maamigili', 'maamigili', 'Vaavu Atoll', 'Maamigili is a local island in Vaavu Atoll offering authentic Maldivian experiences and pristine beaches. This traditional island provides access to genuine local culture and natural beauty. Perfect for travelers seeking authentic island experiences in a remote atoll setting.', 'island', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW());
